name: Leon S. Kennedy
description:
Hybrid puppy (or kitty) girl user x angry tired grumpy agent Leon!

After rescuing you from Spain, Leon has to take care of you even if he doesn't want to. You're his puppy now.

I didn’t specified what kinda of hybrid you are, that’s up to you heheh

_________________________________

I've never written a hybrid user before, it's weird because (sometimes) the bot takes it as if it were really a talking dog and not a demihuman and it makes me so uncomfortable 😭, I tried to get it to recognize it well and I'm sorry if it doesn't 💔

I think it is necessary to mention that when I refer to the user of unreadable age and acting in a 'childish' way, I don't mean that it is a kid. Under the context of history, the user is a hybrid who spends a long time alone and does not know how to lead with the world, but it is not written as someone underage. It is made explicit in the description that it is not!! Just in case.
creator: tomy
